_note: Field and link lists are summarized from official ERPNext/Frappe documentation in the study's own words, not copied from source. Field names follow Frappe's snake_case convention. Submittable doctypes carry a docstatus field (0/1/2).

doctypes.name: Company
doctypes.purpose: Top-level legal entity; nearly all transactions are scoped to a company.

doctypes.name: Fiscal Year
doctypes.purpose: Accounting period boundaries used to scope GL postings and reports.

doctypes.name: Account
doctypes.purpose: Node in the Chart of Accounts; ledger accounts receive GL postings, group accounts aggregate.

doctypes.name: Cost Center
doctypes.purpose: Dimension for departmental/functional cost and revenue allocation.

doctypes.name: GL Entry
doctypes.purpose: Immutable double-entry general-ledger posting generated by submitted accounting/stock vouchers.

doctypes.name: Journal Entry
doctypes.purpose: Manual/adjusting multi-line accounting voucher (submittable).

doctypes.name: Payment Entry
doctypes.purpose: Record payments/receipts and allocate them against invoices/orders (submittable).

doctypes.name: Sales Invoice
doctypes.purpose: Customer bill; on submit posts GL (and optionally stock for POS/update-stock) (submittable).

doctypes.name: Purchase Invoice
doctypes.purpose: Supplier bill; on submit posts GL (and optionally stock) (submittable).

doctypes.name: Sales Order
doctypes.purpose: Confirmed customer order; drives delivery and billing (submittable).

doctypes.name: Quotation
doctypes.purpose: Price proposal to a lead/customer; convertible to Sales Order (submittable).

doctypes.name: Delivery Note
doctypes.purpose: Records goods shipped to customer; posts stock-out SLEs (submittable).

doctypes.name: Purchase Order
doctypes.purpose: Confirmed order to a supplier; drives receipt and billing (submittable).

doctypes.name: Purchase Receipt
doctypes.purpose: Records goods received from supplier; posts stock-in SLEs (submittable).

doctypes.name: Material Request
doctypes.purpose: Internal request to purchase, transfer, issue, or manufacture material (submittable).

doctypes.name: Stock Entry
doctypes.purpose: Move/issue/receive/manufacture/repack stock between warehouses (submittable).

doctypes.name: Stock Ledger Entry
doctypes.purpose: Immutable per-movement inventory ledger row; basis for stock balance and valuation.

doctypes.name: Bin
doctypes.purpose: Cached per item-warehouse balance (actual/ordered/reserved/projected qty).

doctypes.name: Item
doctypes.purpose: Product/service master used across selling, buying, stock and manufacturing.

doctypes.name: Item Group
doctypes.purpose: Hierarchical classification of items (tree).

doctypes.name: Warehouse
doctypes.purpose: Stocking location (tree); leaf warehouses hold stock.

doctypes.name: Batch
doctypes.purpose: Lot tracking for batch-managed items (expiry, manufacturing date).

doctypes.name: Serial No
doctypes.purpose: Unique unit tracking for serialized items.

doctypes.name: Stock Reconciliation
doctypes.purpose: Set opening stock or adjust qty/valuation to a counted figure (submittable).

doctypes.name: Customer
doctypes.purpose: Party master for sales transactions.

doctypes.name: Supplier
doctypes.purpose: Party master for purchase transactions.

doctypes.name: Contact
doctypes.purpose: Person record linked to one or more parties via dynamic links.

doctypes.name: Address
doctypes.purpose: Postal address shared by parties via dynamic links.

doctypes.name: Price List
doctypes.purpose: Named set of item prices (selling and/or buying).

doctypes.name: Item Price
doctypes.purpose: Price of an item within a price list.

doctypes.name: Pricing Rule
doctypes.purpose: Conditional discounts/free-item/price overrides applied to transactions.

doctypes.name: Lead
doctypes.purpose: Unqualified sales prospect at the top of the funnel.

doctypes.name: Opportunity
doctypes.purpose: Qualified sales opportunity with forecastable value.

doctypes.name: Campaign
doctypes.purpose: Marketing campaign grouping leads/opportunities.

doctypes.name: Project
doctypes.purpose: Container for tasks, timesheets, costing and billing.

doctypes.name: Task
doctypes.purpose: Unit of work within a project, with dependencies and progress.

doctypes.name: Timesheet
doctypes.purpose: Record time spent on tasks/activities; can be billed (submittable).

doctypes.name: Issue
doctypes.purpose: Customer support ticket in ERPNext core (HD Ticket is its equivalent in the standalone Frappe Helpdesk app).

doctypes.name: HD Ticket
doctypes.purpose: Support ticket in the standalone Frappe Helpdesk product (modern replacement for ERPNext Issue UI).

doctypes.name: Service Level Agreement
doctypes.purpose: Defines response/resolution targets and applicable hours for tickets.

doctypes.name: Asset
doctypes.purpose: Fixed asset tracked through acquisition, depreciation, and disposal.

doctypes.name: Asset Category
doctypes.purpose: Grouping of assets sharing depreciation/account settings.

doctypes.name: Asset Movement
doctypes.purpose: Transfer an asset between locations/custodians (submittable).

doctypes.name: BOM
doctypes.purpose: Bill of Materials defining components, operations and costs to make an item (submittable).

doctypes.name: Work Order
doctypes.purpose: Order to manufacture a quantity of an item per a BOM (submittable).

doctypes.name: Job Card
doctypes.purpose: Track a single operation of a Work Order at a workstation (submittable).

doctypes.name: Production Plan
doctypes.purpose: Plan production and material procurement from demand (sales orders/forecast) (submittable).

doctypes.name: Workstation
doctypes.purpose: Machine/work-center where operations run; carries hourly cost.

doctypes.name: Quality Inspection
doctypes.purpose: Record inspection readings against an item for a stock transaction (submittable).

doctypes.name: Employee
doctypes.purpose: Employee master and lifecycle record.

doctypes.name: Leave Application
doctypes.purpose: Employee leave request subject to approval (submittable; commonly workflow-driven).

doctypes.name: Salary Structure
doctypes.purpose: Template of earning/deduction components and formulas for payroll (submittable).

doctypes.name: Salary Slip
doctypes.purpose: Per-employee, per-period payslip computed from salary structure and attendance (submittable).

doctypes.name: Payroll Entry
doctypes.purpose: Batch generation of salary slips and the payroll accounting entry (submittable).

doctypes.name: Expense Claim
doctypes.purpose: Employee reimbursement request with approval and accounting (submittable).

doctypes.name: POS Profile
doctypes.purpose: Point-of-sale configuration: warehouse, payment modes, price list, accounts.

doctypes.name: POS Invoice
doctypes.purpose: Point-of-sale Sales Invoice with offline support; consolidated on closing (submittable).

doctypes.name: Workflow
doctypes.purpose: Defines the state machine attached to a DocType: states, transitions, allowed roles.

doctypes.name: Workflow State
doctypes.purpose: Named, reusable state label (with style/icon) referenced by workflows.

doctypes.name: Workflow Action Master
doctypes.purpose: Reusable action label (e.g. Approve, Reject, Review) used in transitions.

doctypes.name: Workflow Document State (child)
doctypes.purpose: A state within a specific workflow: maps to a doc_status and allowed editing role.

doctypes.name: Workflow Transition (child)
doctypes.purpose: A transition from one state to another via an action, gated by role and optional condition.

doctypes.name: Role
doctypes.purpose: Named set of capabilities assigned to users; basis of DocType permissions.

doctypes.name: DocType
doctypes.purpose: Meta-model defining a model+view; generates tab{DocType} table and CRUD/API/permissions.

doctypes.name: Custom Field
doctypes.purpose: Add a field to an existing DocType without modifying the standard app (customization).

doctypes.name: Property Setter
doctypes.purpose: Override a standard DocType/DocField property via Customize Form without code changes.

doctypes.name: Naming Series
doctypes.purpose: Configure and manage auto-naming prefixes/counters for documents (e.g. SINV-.YYYY.-).

doctypes.name: Mode of Payment
doctypes.purpose: Payment method (Cash/Bank/Card) mapped to default accounts per company.

doctypes.name: Sales Taxes and Charges Template
doctypes.purpose: Reusable tax/charge rows applied to selling transactions.

doctypes.name: Version
doctypes.purpose: Audit log of field-level changes to a tracked document (change history).
